role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of text and remained neutral.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, vegetation, and climate cues.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed specific tree species (Pinus sylvestris, Betula pendula) and understory.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed road markings (double yellow lines) and infrastructure.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Evaluated image quality, camera generation artifacts, and general road texture.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified the country as Finland. The agents provided high-quality, domain-specific evidence (e.g., double yellow lines, specific tree species) that effectively narrowed the candidates from a global boreal forest to the specific Nordic region.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Accurately described the flat, mossy, pine-dominant terrain.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Accurately identified the visible pine and birch species.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Accurately described the double yellow center lines and white edge lines.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Accurately assessed the image quality and lack of roadside infrastructure.
